table.name: int_account_status_current
table.viewSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT a.load_id, a.source_system, a.cadence, a.drop_date, a.ingested_at, a.status_date, a.status_date_raw, a.store_code, a.store_code_raw, a.account_status, a.account_status_raw, a.status_reason, a.status_reason_raw, a.is_missing_key, a.is_duplicate_candidate, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY a.store_code) AS version_count, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY a.store_code ORDER BY COALESCE(a.status_date, a.drop_date) DESC NULLS LAST, a.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, a.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, a.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM stg.stg_account_status a WHERE (a.store_code IS NOT NULL) ) SELECT ranked.store_code, ranked.status_date, ranked.account_status, ranked.status_reason, ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.version_count FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1);

table.name: int_coverage_conformed
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT c.as_of_date, c.store_code, c.sku, c.distribution_status, c.status_reason, c.as_of_date_raw, c.store_code_raw, c.sku_raw, c.distribution_status_raw, c.is_missing_key, c.is_duplicate_candidate, c.load_id, c.source_system, c.cadence, c.drop_date, c.ingested_at, c.dup_group_size FROM "int".int_sku_distribution_status_dedup c WHERE ((c.as_of_date IS NOT NULL) AND (c.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (c.sku IS NOT NULL)) ), classified AS ( SELECT b.as_of_date, b.store_code, b.sku, b.distribution_status, b.status_reason, CASE WHEN (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['carried'::text, 'listed'::text, 'active'::text, 'in_distribution'::text, 'available'::text])) THEN 'carried'::text WHEN (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'pending_launch'::text, 'onboarding'::text])) THEN 'pending'::text WHEN (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['not_carried'::text, 'not_listed'::text, 'inactive'::text])) THEN 'not_carried'::text WHEN (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['discontinued'::text, 'retired'::text])) THEN 'discontinued'::text WHEN (b.distribution_status IS NULL) THEN NULL::text ELSE b.distribution_status END AS coverage_status, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['carried'::text, 'listed'::text, 'active'::text, 'in_distribution'::text, 'available'::text])) AS is_carried, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'pending_launch'::text, 'onboarding'::text])) AS is_pending, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['not_carried'::text, 'not_listed'::text, 'inactive'::text])) AS is_not_carried, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['discontinued'::text, 'retired'::text])) AS is_discontinued, b.as_of_date_raw, b.store_code_raw, b.sku_raw, b.distribution_status_raw, COALESCE(b.is_missing_key, false) AS is_missing_key, COALESCE(b.is_duplicate_candidate, false) AS is_duplicate_candidate, b.load_id, b.source_system, b.cadence, b.drop_date, b.ingested_at, b.dup_group_size FROM base b ), ranged AS ( SELECT c.as_of_date, c.store_code, c.sku, c.distribution_status, c.status_reason, c.coverage_status, c.is_carried, c.is_pending, c.is_not_carried, c.is_discontinued, c.as_of_date_raw, c.store_code_raw, c.sku_raw, c.distribution_status_raw, c.is_missing_key, c.is_duplicate_candidate, c.load_id, c.source_system, c.cadence, c.drop_date, c.ingested_at, c.dup_group_size, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY c.store_code, c.sku) AS version_count, lead(c.as_of_date) OVER (PARTITION BY c.store_code, c.sku ORDER BY c.as_of_date) AS next_as_of_date FROM classified c ), store_ctx AS ( SELECT r.as_of_date, r.store_code, r.sku, r.distribution_status, r.status_reason, r.coverage_status, r.is_carried, r.is_pending, r.is_not_carried, r.is_discontinued, r.as_of_date_raw, r.store_code_raw, r.sku_raw, r.distribution_status_raw, r.is_missing_key, r.is_duplicate_candidate, r.load_id, r.source_system, r.cadence, r.drop_date, r.ingested_at, r.dup_group_size, r.version_count, r.next_as_of_date, (d.store_code IS NULL) AS is_missing_store_dim, s.account_status, s.status_date AS account_status_date, (lower(s.account_status) = 'active'::text) AS is_active_account, (lower(s.account_status) = ANY (ARRAY['inactive'::text, 'suspended'::text])) AS is_inactive_or_suspended FROM ((ranged r LEFT JOIN "int".int_dispensary_latest d ON ((d.store_code = r.store_code))) LEFT JOIN "int".int_account_status_current s ON ((s.store_code = r.store_code))) ) SELECT store_ctx.as_of_date, store_ctx.store_code, store_ctx.sku, store_ctx.coverage_status, store_ctx.distribution_status, store_ctx.status_reason, store_ctx.is_carried, store_ctx.is_pending, store_ctx.is_not_carried, store_ctx.is_discontinued, store_ctx.as_of_date AS effective_start_date, CASE WHEN (store_ctx.next_as_of_date IS NULL) THEN NULL::date ELSE ((store_ctx.next_as_of_date - '1 day'::interval))::date END AS effective_end_date, store_ctx.next_as_of_date, store_ctx.account_status, store_ctx.account_status_date, store_ctx.is_active_account, store_ctx.is_inactive_or_suspended, store_ctx.is_missing_store_dim, store_ctx.is_missing_key, store_ctx.is_duplicate_candidate, store_ctx.version_count, store_ctx.dup_group_size, store_ctx.load_id, store_ctx.source_system, store_ctx.cadence, store_ctx.drop_date, store_ctx.ingested_at FROM store_ctx;

table.name: int_dispensary_latest
table.viewSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT dm.load_id, dm.source_system, dm.cadence, dm.drop_date, dm.ingested_at, dm.as_of_date, dm.as_of_date_raw, dm.dispensary_id, dm.dispensary_id_raw, dm.store_code, dm.store_code_raw, dm.dispensary_name_raw, dm.dispensary_name, dm.state_raw, dm.state, dm.city_raw, dm.city, dm.postal_code_raw, dm.postal_code, dm.license_id_raw, dm.license_id, dm.account_type_raw, dm.account_type, dm.is_missing_key, dm.is_bad_state_code, dm.is_bad_postal_code, dm.is_duplicate_candidate, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY dm.store_code) AS version_count, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY dm.store_code ORDER BY COALESCE(dm.as_of_date, dm.drop_date) DESC NULLS LAST, (COALESCE(dm.is_missing_key, false) IS FALSE) DESC, (dm.dispensary_id IS NOT NULL) DESC, (dm.dispensary_name IS NOT NULL) DESC, dm.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, dm.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, dm.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM stg.stg_dispensary_master dm WHERE (dm.store_code IS NOT NULL) ) SELECT ranked.store_code, ranked.dispensary_id, ranked.dispensary_name, ranked.state, ranked.city, ranked.postal_code, ranked.license_id, ranked.account_type, ranked.as_of_date, ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, COALESCE(ranked.is_missing_key, false) AS is_missing_key, COALESCE(ranked.is_duplicate_candidate, false) AS is_duplicate_candidate, ranked.version_count FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1);

table.name: int_dispensary_standardized
table.viewSql: SELECT d.store_code, d.dispensary_id, d.dispensary_name, d.state, d.city, d.postal_code, d.license_id, d.account_type, s.account_status, s.status_reason AS account_status_reason, s.status_date AS account_status_date, (lower(s.account_status) = 'active'::text) AS is_active_account, (lower(s.account_status) = ANY (ARRAY['inactive'::text, 'suspended'::text])) AS is_inactive_or_suspended, (lower(s.account_status) = 'pending'::text) AS is_pending_account, d.as_of_date AS dispensary_as_of_date, d.load_id AS dispensary_load_id, d.source_system AS dispensary_source_system, d.cadence AS dispensary_cadence, d.drop_date AS dispensary_drop_date, d.ingested_at AS dispensary_ingested_at, s.load_id AS status_load_id, s.source_system AS status_source_system, s.cadence AS status_cadence, s.drop_date AS status_drop_date, s.ingested_at AS status_ingested_at, COALESCE(d.is_missing_key, false) AS dispensary_is_missing_key, COALESCE(d.is_duplicate_candidate, false) AS dispensary_is_duplicate_candidate, d.version_count AS dispensary_version_count, s.version_count AS status_version_count FROM ("int".int_dispensary_latest d LEFT JOIN "int".int_account_status_current s ON ((s.store_code = d.store_code)));

table.name: int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly
table.viewSql: SELECT stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.week_start_date, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.store_code, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.state, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.region, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.sku, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.product_name, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.product_family, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.channel, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.plan_version, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_units, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_units, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_unit_price, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_unit_price, (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_units - stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_units) AS unit_variance, (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales - stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales) AS sales_variance, CASE WHEN (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales - stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales) / stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales) END AS sales_variance_pct, abs((stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales - stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales)) AS absolute_sales_error, CASE WHEN (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (abs((stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales - stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales)) / stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales) END AS absolute_percent_error, CASE WHEN (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NULL) THEN true ELSE false END AS is_missing_actual, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.is_partial_actual, CASE WHEN (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NULL) THEN 'partial_actual'::text WHEN (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales > stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales) THEN 'above_forecast'::text WHEN (stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales < stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales) THEN 'below_forecast'::text ELSE 'on_forecast'::text END AS forecast_performance_status, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.promo_flag, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.stockout_flag, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.seasonality_label, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.business_event, stg_forecast_actuals_weekly.loaded_at FROM stg.stg_forecast_actuals_weekly;

table.name: int_ghg_activity_all
table.viewSql: SELECT md5(concat_ws('|'::text, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.source_system, (stg_ghg_electricity_bills.raw_row_id)::text, (stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_month)::text, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.facility_id, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.factor_type)) AS activity_id, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.source_system, (stg_ghg_electricity_bills.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_month, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.scope, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.facility_id, NULL::text AS product_line_id, 'electricity'::text AS activity_category, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.factor_type, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_amount, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_unit, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.invoice_amount_usd AS cost_usd, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.invoice_number AS evidence_reference, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.has_negative_activity, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.has_missing_facility_id, false AS has_missing_product_line_id, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.has_invalid_activity_month, false AS has_unknown_activity_type FROM stg.stg_ghg_electricity_bills UNION ALL SELECT md5(concat_ws('|'::text, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.source_system, (stg_ghg_fuel_usage.raw_row_id)::text, (stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_month)::text, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.facility_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.factor_type)) AS activity_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.source_system, (stg_ghg_fuel_usage.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_month, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.scope, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.facility_id, NULL::text AS product_line_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.fuel_type AS activity_category, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.factor_type, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_amount, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_unit, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.cost_usd, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.invoice_number AS evidence_reference, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.has_negative_activity, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.has_missing_facility_id, false AS has_missing_product_line_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.has_invalid_activity_month, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.has_unknown_fuel_type AS has_unknown_activity_type FROM stg.stg_ghg_fuel_usage UNION ALL SELECT md5(concat_ws('|'::text, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.source_system, (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.raw_row_id)::text, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_id, (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_month)::text, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.facility_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.product_line_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.factor_type)) AS activity_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.source_system, (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_month, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.scope, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.facility_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.product_line_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipping_mode AS activity_category, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.factor_type, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_amount, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_unit, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.freight_cost_usd AS cost_usd, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_id AS evidence_reference, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.has_negative_activity, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.has_missing_facility_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.has_missing_product_line_id, (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_date IS NULL) AS has_invalid_activity_month, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.has_unknown_shipping_mode AS has_unknown_activity_type FROM stg.stg_ghg_shipping_miles UNION ALL SELECT md5(concat_ws('|'::text, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.source_system, (stg_ghg_packaging_materials.raw_row_id)::text, (stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_month)::text, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.facility_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.product_line_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.factor_type, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.invoice_number)) AS activity_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.source_system, (stg_ghg_packaging_materials.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_month, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.scope, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.facility_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.product_line_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.material_type AS activity_category, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.factor_type, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_amount, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_unit, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.cost_usd, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.invoice_number AS evidence_reference, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.has_negative_activity, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.has_missing_facility_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.has_missing_product_line_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.has_invalid_activity_month, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.has_unknown_material_type AS has_unknown_activity_type FROM stg.stg_ghg_packaging_materials;

table.name: int_ghg_activity_with_factors
table.viewSql: SELECT a.activity_id, a.source_system, a.source_record_id, a.activity_month, a.scope, a.facility_id, f.facility_name, f.facility_type, f.state_province, f.country, f.grid_region, a.product_line_id, p.product_line_name, p.product_family, a.activity_category, a.factor_type, a.activity_amount, a.activity_unit, a.cost_usd, a.evidence_reference, ef.factor_id, ef.factor_version, ef.source_authority, ef.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit, CASE WHEN ((a.activity_amount IS NOT NULL) AND (ef.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit IS NOT NULL) AND (a.activity_amount >= (0)::numeric)) THEN (a.activity_amount * ef.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS kg_co2e, CASE WHEN ((a.activity_amount IS NOT NULL) AND (ef.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit IS NOT NULL) AND (a.activity_amount >= (0)::numeric)) THEN ((a.activity_amount * ef.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit) / 1000.0) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS metric_tons_co2e, a.has_negative_activity, a.has_missing_facility_id, a.has_missing_product_line_id, a.has_invalid_activity_month, a.has_unknown_activity_type, (f.facility_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_facility_join, ((p.product_line_id IS NULL) AND (a.product_line_id IS NOT NULL)) AS has_missing_product_line_join, (ef.factor_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_factor_join FROM ((("int".int_ghg_activity_all a LEFT JOIN stg.stg_ghg_facility_master f ON ((a.facility_id = f.facility_id))) LEFT JOIN stg.stg_ghg_product_line_master p ON ((a.product_line_id = p.product_line_id))) LEFT JOIN stg.stg_ghg_emission_factors ef ON (((a.factor_type = ef.factor_type) AND (a.activity_unit = ef.activity_unit) AND ((a.activity_month >= ef.effective_start) AND (a.activity_month <= ef.effective_end)) AND ( CASE WHEN (a.scope = 'Scope 2'::text) THEN f.grid_region ELSE 'US'::text END = ef.region))));

table.name: int_inventory_snapshot_dedup
table.viewSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT i.load_id, i.source_system, i.cadence, i.drop_date, i.ingested_at, i.snapshot_date, i.snapshot_date_raw, i.site_code, i.site_code_raw, i.sku, i.on_hand, i.on_hand_raw, i.received_units, i.received_units_raw, i.shipped_units, i.shipped_units_raw, i.requested_units, i.requested_units_raw, i.backordered_units, i.backordered_units_raw, i.on_hand_nonnegative, i.is_negative_inventory, i.in_stock_flag, i.is_missing_key, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY i.snapshot_date, i.site_code, i.sku ORDER BY (i.is_missing_key = false) DESC, (COALESCE(i.is_negative_inventory, false) = false) DESC, i.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, i.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, i.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM stg.stg_inventory_erp i WHERE ((i.snapshot_date IS NOT NULL) AND (i.site_code IS NOT NULL) AND (i.sku IS NOT NULL)) ) SELECT ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.snapshot_date, ranked.snapshot_date_raw, ranked.site_code, ranked.site_code_raw, ranked.sku, ranked.on_hand, ranked.on_hand_raw, ranked.received_units, ranked.received_units_raw, ranked.shipped_units, ranked.shipped_units_raw, ranked.requested_units, ranked.requested_units_raw, ranked.backordered_units, ranked.backordered_units_raw, ranked.on_hand_nonnegative, ranked.is_negative_inventory, ranked.in_stock_flag, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.rn FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1);

table.name: int_labor_daily
table.viewSql: WITH e AS ( SELECT int_labor_daily_employee.work_date, int_labor_daily_employee.store_code, int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id, int_labor_daily_employee.hours_worked, int_labor_daily_employee.minutes_worked, int_labor_daily_employee.n_shift_pairs, int_labor_daily_employee.n_events, int_labor_daily_employee.n_unpaired_in, int_labor_daily_employee.n_out_events, int_labor_daily_employee.min_ingested_at, int_labor_daily_employee.max_ingested_at, int_labor_daily_employee.min_drop_date, int_labor_daily_employee.max_drop_date FROM "int".int_labor_daily_employee ) SELECT e.work_date, e.store_code, sum(COALESCE(e.hours_worked, (0)::numeric)) AS hours_worked, sum(COALESCE(e.minutes_worked, (0)::numeric)) AS minutes_worked, count(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS n_employees, (sum(COALESCE(e.n_shift_pairs, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS n_shift_pairs, (sum(COALESCE(e.n_events, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS n_events, (sum(COALESCE(e.n_unpaired_in, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS n_unpaired_in, (sum(COALESCE(e.n_out_events, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS n_out_events, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(count(DISTINCT e.employee_id), 0) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum(COALESCE(e.hours_worked, (0)::numeric)) / (NULLIF(count(DISTINCT e.employee_id), 0))::numeric) END AS avg_hours_per_employee, min(e.min_ingested_at) AS min_ingested_at, max(e.max_ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, min(e.min_drop_date) AS min_drop_date, max(e.max_drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM e GROUP BY e.work_date, e.store_code;

table.name: int_labor_daily_employee
table.viewSql: WITH events AS ( SELECT p.store_code, p.employee_id, p.punch_date AS work_date, p.punch_ts, upper(p.action) AS action, p.load_id, p.drop_date, p.ingested_at FROM "int".int_timeclock_punches_latest p WHERE ((p.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (p.employee_id IS NOT NULL) AND (p.punch_date IS NOT NULL) AND (p.punch_ts IS NOT NULL) AND (p.action IS NOT NULL)) ), ordered AS ( SELECT e.store_code, e.employee_id, e.work_date, e.punch_ts, e.action, e.load_id, e.drop_date, e.ingested_at, lead(e.action) OVER (PARTITION BY e.store_code, e.employee_id ORDER BY e.punch_ts) AS next_action, lead(e.punch_ts) OVER (PARTITION BY e.store_code, e.employee_id ORDER BY e.punch_ts) AS next_ts FROM events e ), pairs AS ( SELECT ordered.store_code, ordered.employee_id, ordered.work_date, ordered.punch_ts AS clock_in_at, ordered.next_ts AS clock_out_at, GREATEST((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (ordered.next_ts - ordered.punch_ts)) / 60.0), (0)::numeric) AS minutes_worked, ordered.load_id, ordered.drop_date, ordered.ingested_at FROM ordered WHERE ((ordered.action = 'IN'::text) AND (ordered.next_action = 'OUT'::text) AND (ordered.next_ts IS NOT NULL) AND (ordered.next_ts >= ordered.punch_ts)) ), agg AS ( SELECT p.work_date, p.store_code, p.employee_id, sum(p.minutes_worked) AS minutes_worked, (sum(p.minutes_worked) / 60.0) AS hours_worked, count(*) AS n_shift_pairs, ( SELECT count(*) AS count FROM events e WHERE ((e.work_date = p.work_date) AND (e.store_code = p.store_code) AND (e.employee_id = p.employee_id))) AS n_events, ( SELECT count(*) AS count FROM ordered o WHERE ((o.work_date = p.work_date) AND (o.store_code = p.store_code) AND (o.employee_id = p.employee_id) AND (o.action = 'IN'::text) AND ((o.next_action IS DISTINCT FROM 'OUT'::text) OR (o.next_ts IS NULL)))) AS n_unpaired_in, ( SELECT count(*) AS count FROM events e WHERE ((e.work_date = p.work_date) AND (e.store_code = p.store_code) AND (e.employee_id = p.employee_id) AND (e.action = 'OUT'::text))) AS n_out_events, min(p.ingested_at) AS min_ingested_at, max(p.ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, min(p.drop_date) AS min_drop_date, max(p.drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM pairs p GROUP BY p.work_date, p.store_code, p.employee_id ) SELECT agg.work_date, agg.store_code, agg.employee_id, agg.minutes_worked, agg.hours_worked, agg.n_shift_pairs, agg.n_events, agg.n_unpaired_in, agg.n_out_events, agg.min_ingested_at, agg.max_ingested_at, agg.min_drop_date, agg.max_drop_date FROM agg;

table.name: int_pos_daily
table.viewSql: SELECT int_pos_dedup.txn_date, int_pos_dedup.store_code, int_pos_dedup.sku, count(*) AS line_count, count(DISTINCT int_pos_dedup.txn_id) AS txn_count, sum(COALESCE(int_pos_dedup.qty, 0)) AS units, sum(COALESCE(int_pos_dedup.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)) AS gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(int_pos_dedup.net_amount, (0)::double precision)) AS net_sales FROM "int".int_pos_dedup WHERE ((int_pos_dedup.txn_date IS NOT NULL) AND (int_pos_dedup.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (int_pos_dedup.sku IS NOT NULL)) GROUP BY int_pos_dedup.txn_date, int_pos_dedup.store_code, int_pos_dedup.sku;

table.name: int_pos_dedup
table.viewSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT p.load_id, p.source_system, p.cadence, p.drop_date, p.ingested_at, p.txn_id, p.txn_ts_raw, p.txn_ts_parsed, p.txn_date, p.store_code, p.store_code_raw, p.sku, p.product_sku_raw, p.qty, p.qty_raw, p.unit_price, p.unit_price_raw, p.discount_pct, p.discount_pct_raw, p.gross_amount, p.gross_amount_raw, p.net_amount, p.net_amount_raw, p.is_missing_key, p.is_duplicate_candidate, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY p.txn_id ORDER BY (p.txn_ts_parsed IS NOT NULL) DESC, (p.store_code IS NOT NULL) DESC, (p.sku IS NOT NULL) DESC, p.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, p.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, p.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM stg.stg_pos_transactions p WHERE (p.txn_id IS NOT NULL) ) SELECT ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.txn_id, ranked.txn_ts_raw, ranked.txn_ts_parsed, ranked.txn_date, ranked.store_code, ranked.store_code_raw, ranked.sku, ranked.product_sku_raw, ranked.qty, ranked.qty_raw, ranked.unit_price, ranked.unit_price_raw, ranked.discount_pct, ranked.discount_pct_raw, ranked.gross_amount, ranked.gross_amount_raw, ranked.net_amount, ranked.net_amount_raw, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.is_duplicate_candidate, ranked.rn FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1);

table.name: int_price_volume_mix_variance
table.viewSql: SELECT int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.week_start_date, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.store_code, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.state, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.region, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.sku, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.product_name, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.product_family, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.channel, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.plan_version, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_units, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.sales_variance AS total_sales_variance, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.unit_variance, CASE WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_units) * int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price) END AS volume_effect, CASE WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price) * int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units) END AS price_effect, CASE WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.sales_variance - ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_units) * int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price)) - ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price) * int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units)) END AS mix_or_residual_effect, CASE WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NULL) THEN 'partial_actual'::text WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.stockout_flag = true) THEN 'stockout'::text WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.promo_flag = true) THEN 'promo'::text WHEN ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units > int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_units) AND (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price >= int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price)) THEN 'volume_up'::text WHEN ((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units < int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_units) AND (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price <= int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price)) THEN 'volume_down'::text WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price > int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price) THEN 'price_up'::text WHEN (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price < int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price) THEN 'price_down'::text ELSE 'base_business'::text END AS primary_variance_driver, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.promo_flag, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.stockout_flag, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.is_partial_actual, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.seasonality_label, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.business_event, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_performance_status, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.loaded_at FROM "int".int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly;

table.name: int_sales_conformed
table.viewSql: WITH distributor AS ( SELECT d.sale_date, d.store_code, d.sku, d.channel, 'distributor'::text AS sales_source, d.product_name, (d.qty)::numeric AS qty, d.gross_sales, d.discount_amount, d.net_sales, d.cogs, (d.orders)::bigint AS orders, (d.customers)::bigint AS customers, d.unit_list_price, d.unit_net_price, d.discount_rate, (COALESCE(d.dup_group_size, (1)::bigint))::integer AS n_source_rows, (GREATEST((COALESCE(d.dup_group_size, (1)::bigint) - 1), (0)::bigint))::integer AS n_dup_candidate_rows, d.load_id, d.source_system, d.cadence, d.drop_date, d.ingested_at FROM "int".int_sales_distributor_dedup d WHERE ((d.sale_date IS NOT NULL) AND (d.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (d.sku IS NOT NULL) AND (d.channel IS NOT NULL)) ), pos_daily AS ( SELECT p.txn_date AS sale_date, p.store_code, p.sku, 'retail'::text AS channel, 'pos'::text AS sales_source, NULL::text AS product_name, (sum(COALESCE(p.qty, 0)))::numeric AS qty, (sum(COALESCE(p.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric AS gross_sales, ((sum(COALESCE(p.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)) - sum(COALESCE(p.net_amount, (0)::double precision))))::numeric AS discount_amount, (sum(COALESCE(p.net_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric AS net_sales, NULL::numeric AS cogs, count(DISTINCT p.txn_id) AS orders, NULL::bigint AS customers, CASE WHEN (NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(p.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((sum(COALESCE(p.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric / NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(p.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) END AS unit_list_price, CASE WHEN (NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(p.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((sum(COALESCE(p.net_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric / NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(p.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) END AS unit_net_price, CASE WHEN (NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(p.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (((sum(COALESCE(p.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric - (sum(COALESCE(p.net_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric) / NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(p.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) END AS discount_rate, (count(*))::integer AS n_source_rows, 0 AS n_dup_candidate_rows, max(p.load_id) AS load_id, max(p.source_system) AS source_system, max(p.cadence) AS cadence, max(p.drop_date) AS drop_date, max(p.ingested_at) AS ingested_at FROM "int".int_pos_dedup p WHERE ((p.txn_date IS NOT NULL) AND (p.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (p.sku IS NOT NULL)) GROUP BY p.txn_date, p.store_code, p.sku, 'retail'::text, 'pos'::text ), sales_union AS ( SELECT distributor.sale_date, distributor.store_code, distributor.sku, distributor.channel, distributor.sales_source, distributor.product_name, distributor.qty, distributor.gross_sales, distributor.discount_amount, distributor.net_sales, distributor.cogs, distributor.orders, distributor.customers, distributor.unit_list_price, distributor.unit_net_price, distributor.discount_rate, distributor.n_source_rows, distributor.n_dup_candidate_rows, distributor.load_id, distributor.source_system, distributor.cadence, distributor.drop_date, distributor.ingested_at FROM distributor UNION ALL SELECT pos_daily.sale_date, pos_daily.store_code, pos_daily.sku, pos_daily.channel, pos_daily.sales_source, pos_daily.product_name, pos_daily.qty, pos_daily.gross_sales, pos_daily.discount_amount, pos_daily.net_sales, pos_daily.cogs, pos_daily.orders, pos_daily.customers, pos_daily.unit_list_price, pos_daily.unit_net_price, pos_daily.discount_rate, pos_daily.n_source_rows, pos_daily.n_dup_candidate_rows, pos_daily.load_id, pos_daily.source_system, pos_daily.cadence, pos_daily.drop_date, pos_daily.ingested_at FROM pos_daily ), product_ranked AS ( SELECT d.sku, d.product_name, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d.sku ORDER BY d.sale_date DESC NULLS LAST, d.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, d.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, d.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM "int".int_sales_distributor_dedup d WHERE ((d.sku IS NOT NULL) AND (d.product_name IS NOT NULL)) ), product_lookup AS ( SELECT product_ranked.sku, product_ranked.product_name FROM product_ranked WHERE (product_ranked.rn = 1) ), store_ctx AS ( SELECT d.store_code, d.dispensary_id, d.dispensary_name, d.state, d.city, d.postal_code, d.license_id, d.account_type, s.account_status, s.status_reason AS account_status_reason, s.status_date AS account_status_date, (lower(s.account_status) = 'active'::text) AS is_active_account, (lower(s.account_status) = ANY (ARRAY['inactive'::text, 'suspended'::text])) AS is_inactive_or_suspended FROM ("int".int_dispensary_latest d LEFT JOIN "int".int_account_status_current s ON ((s.store_code = d.store_code))) ) SELECT u.sale_date, u.store_code, u.sku, u.channel, u.sales_source, COALESCE(u.product_name, pl.product_name) AS product_name, sc.dispensary_id, sc.dispensary_name, sc.state, sc.city, sc.postal_code, sc.license_id, sc.account_type, sc.account_status, sc.account_status_reason, sc.account_status_date, sc.is_active_account, sc.is_inactive_or_suspended, (sc.store_code IS NULL) AS is_missing_store_dim, (COALESCE(u.product_name, pl.product_name) IS NULL) AS is_missing_product_label, u.qty, u.gross_sales, u.discount_amount, u.net_sales, u.cogs, u.orders, u.customers, u.unit_list_price, u.unit_net_price, u.discount_rate, u.n_source_rows, u.n_dup_candidate_rows, u.load_id, u.source_system, u.cadence, u.drop_date, u.ingested_at FROM ((sales_union u LEFT JOIN product_lookup pl ON ((pl.sku = u.sku))) LEFT JOIN store_ctx sc ON ((sc.store_code = u.store_code)));

table.name: int_sales_distributor_dedup
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT s.load_id, s.source_system, s.cadence, s.drop_date, s.ingested_at, s.sale_date, s.sale_date_raw, s.store_code, s.store_id_raw, s.sku, s.product_name_raw, s.product_name, s.channel_raw, s.channel, s.qty, s.qty_raw, s.unit_list_price, s.unit_list_price_raw, s.discount_rate, s.discount_rate_raw, s.unit_net_price, s.unit_net_price_raw, s.gross_sales, s.gross_sales_raw, s.discount_amount, s.discount_amount_raw, s.net_sales, s.net_sales_raw, s.cogs, s.cogs_raw, s.orders, s.orders_raw, s.customers, s.customers_raw, s.is_bad_amount, s.is_missing_key, s.is_duplicate_candidate FROM stg.stg_sales_distributor s WHERE ((s.sale_date IS NOT NULL) AND (s.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (s.sku IS NOT NULL) AND (s.channel IS NOT NULL)) ), ranked AS ( SELECT b.load_id, b.source_system, b.cadence, b.drop_date, b.ingested_at, b.sale_date, b.sale_date_raw, b.store_code, b.store_id_raw, b.sku, b.product_name_raw, b.product_name, b.channel_raw, b.channel, b.qty, b.qty_raw, b.unit_list_price, b.unit_list_price_raw, b.discount_rate, b.discount_rate_raw, b.unit_net_price, b.unit_net_price_raw, b.gross_sales, b.gross_sales_raw, b.discount_amount, b.discount_amount_raw, b.net_sales, b.net_sales_raw, b.cogs, b.cogs_raw, b.orders, b.orders_raw, b.customers, b.customers_raw, b.is_bad_amount, b.is_missing_key, b.is_duplicate_candidate, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY b.sale_date, b.store_code, b.sku, b.channel) AS dup_group_size, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY b.sale_date, b.store_code, b.sku, b.channel ORDER BY b.is_missing_key, b.is_bad_amount, b.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, b.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, b.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM base b ) SELECT ranked.sale_date, ranked.store_code, ranked.sku, ranked.channel, ranked.qty, ranked.unit_list_price, ranked.discount_rate, ranked.unit_net_price, ranked.gross_sales, ranked.discount_amount, ranked.net_sales, ranked.cogs, ranked.orders, ranked.customers, ranked.sale_date_raw, ranked.store_id_raw, ranked.channel_raw, ranked.qty_raw, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.is_bad_amount, ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.dup_group_size, ranked.product_name, ranked.product_name_raw FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1);

table.name: int_sku_distribution_status_dedup
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT s.load_id, s.source_system, s.cadence, s.drop_date, s.ingested_at, s.as_of_date, s.as_of_date_raw, s.store_code, s.store_code_raw, s.sku, s.sku_raw, s.distribution_status, s.distribution_status_raw, s.status_reason, s.status_reason_raw, s.is_missing_key, s.is_duplicate_candidate FROM stg.stg_sku_distribution_status s WHERE ((s.as_of_date IS NOT NULL) AND (s.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (s.sku IS NOT NULL)) ), ranked AS ( SELECT b.load_id, b.source_system, b.cadence, b.drop_date, b.ingested_at, b.as_of_date, b.as_of_date_raw, b.store_code, b.store_code_raw, b.sku, b.sku_raw, b.distribution_status, b.distribution_status_raw, b.status_reason, b.status_reason_raw, b.is_missing_key, b.is_duplicate_candidate, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY b.as_of_date, b.store_code, b.sku) AS dup_group_size, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY b.as_of_date, b.store_code, b.sku ORDER BY b.is_missing_key, b.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, b.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, b.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM base b ) SELECT ranked.as_of_date, ranked.store_code, ranked.sku, ranked.distribution_status, ranked.status_reason, ranked.as_of_date_raw, ranked.store_code_raw, ranked.sku_raw, ranked.distribution_status_raw, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.is_duplicate_candidate, ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.dup_group_size FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1);

table.name: int_timeclock_punches_latest
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT p.load_id, p.source_system, p.cadence, p.drop_date, p.ingested_at, p.punch_ts, p.punch_ts_raw, p.punch_date, p.punch_date_src, p.site_code, p.site_code_raw, p.employee_id, p.employee_id_raw, p.action, p.action_raw, p.is_missing_key, p.is_duplicate_candidate, p.is_bad_action FROM stg.stg_timeclock_punches p WHERE ((p.punch_ts IS NOT NULL) AND (p.punch_date IS NOT NULL) AND (p.site_code IS NOT NULL) AND (p.employee_id IS NOT NULL) AND (p.action IS NOT NULL)) ), ranked AS ( SELECT b.load_id, b.source_system, b.cadence, b.drop_date, b.ingested_at, b.punch_ts, b.punch_ts_raw, b.punch_date, b.punch_date_src, b.site_code, b.site_code_raw, b.employee_id, b.employee_id_raw, b.action, b.action_raw, b.is_missing_key, b.is_duplicate_candidate, b.is_bad_action, md5(concat_ws('|'::text, (b.punch_ts)::text, b.site_code, (b.employee_id)::text, b.action)) AS punch_id, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY b.punch_ts, b.site_code, b.employee_id, b.action) AS dup_group_size, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY b.punch_ts, b.site_code, b.employee_id, b.action ORDER BY b.is_missing_key, b.is_bad_action, b.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, b.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, b.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS selected_rank FROM base b ) SELECT ranked.punch_id, ranked.employee_id, ranked.site_code AS store_code, ranked.punch_ts, ranked.punch_date, ranked.action, ranked.site_code_raw, ranked.employee_id_raw, ranked.punch_ts_raw, ranked.punch_date_src, ranked.action_raw, ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.is_duplicate_candidate, ranked.is_bad_action, ranked.dup_group_size, ranked.selected_rank FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.selected_rank = 1);
